answers.contents: Everything around them decays and produces decay, that nothing will endure until the day after tomorrow, except one species of man, the incurably MEDIOCRE. The mediocre alone have a prospect of continuing and propagating themselves--they will be the men of the future, the sole survivors.
我从小就会反抗父母的打骂，打还手，骂还口，我一直因此有负罪感，觉得自己不孝，不像其他孩子一样乖乖挨打，长大了一定走上歧途......
